basics.name: Willem Johannes Smith
basics.label: Full Stack Engineer
basics.summary: Full-stack engineer who ships and owns production systems end to end — React / Next.js and Go / Node on Dockerized CI/CD — with a low-level C / C++ foundation from 42 Abu Dhabi and a growing focus on agentic AI. Production work spans an influencer-marketing platform serving 500+ users at 99.9% uptime, SEO-optimized sites scoring 95+ Lighthouse, and containerized microservices on staging/production DigitalOcean droplets.

work.name: Suportech Embedded
work.summary: Developing desktop software in Python with a PyQt5 front end and a Flask backend, with automated CI/CD release delivery, encryption, and a tested release pipeline.
highlights: Building desktop applications in Python (PyQt5 / Flask) with automated CI/CD release delivery
Implemented data security with envelope encryption (DEK / KEK) to protect sensitive data at rest
Built an application updater with a CI/CD pipeline that publishes versioned executables to a registry for automated rollout
Authoring unit tests on GitHub Actions (windows-latest) runners, with changes gated by code review before merging to dev

work.name: Ratchet Capital
work.summary: Full-time, full-stack development across Ratchet Capital's product portfolio — influencer-marketing platforms, microservices infrastructure, cross-platform mobile, and SEO-optimized marketing sites — spanning Next.js / Vue.js frontends, Go / Node services, Supabase / PostgreSQL, and Docker-based CI/CD on self-hosted infrastructure.
highlights: Shipped through a code-review-gated Git workflow — feature branches reviewed before merging to dev, with weekly dev to main production releases

Megastars.ai v2 (Next.js, Supabase): supported 500+ active influencers at 99.9% uptime and 10K+ daily auth requests, delivering full-stack features; configured multi-provider OAuth (Instagram / TikTok / YouTube), built dashboard features, and improved landing-page SEO

Influenz / Megastars.ai v1 — Tech Lead: led a 4-developer team architecting a 4-service Dockerized microservices platform behind Nginx (Vue / Vite frontend, Gin (Go) API, a dedicated Node OAuth 2.0 / identity service, and PostgreSQL); standardized environments with separate dev and prod Docker Compose stacks driven from a root Makefile, sharing inherited service definitions for DRY config and separation of concerns; provisioned staging and production DigitalOcean droplets on self-hosted Linux GitHub Actions runners with rolling-deploy and automated rollback
Verif-y — Frontend Developer: cut document-verification time ~60% with a cross-platform iOS / Android app (React Native, Expo) featuring canvas signature capture and skeleton loading
ioMega Energy (solo): scored 95+ Lighthouse and cut CSS 60% on a production SEO site with sub-2.1s loads; Dockerized with Nginx and zero-downtime rolling deploys via GitHub Actions
Trescudo (solo): hit 98 performance with 85% image-size reduction (WebP) and sub-100ms responses on a cybersecurity marketing site

projects.name: Jarvis
projects.description: A native macOS voice assistant that runs terminal commands and answers from local or cloud LLMs — 42 tokens/sec on-device within an 18 GB budget.
highlights: Coordinated local inference with cloud models for low-latency, privacy-aware command execution
Achieved 42 tokens/sec local inference within an 18 GB memory budget
Built voice + terminal control via SwiftUI front end and Node orchestration

projects.name: Cormonity
projects.description: Edge platform on Cloudflare Workers + Redis that keeps shared state in sync globally with low latency under high concurrency.
highlights: Built on Next.js with Cloudflare Workers at the edge and Redis for distributed state
Optimized traffic routing for resilient, low-latency delivery worldwide

projects.name: Jellybean PM
projects.description: Full-featured project-management integration for Astro sites, powered entirely by GitHub Issues. Embeds a drag-and-drop Kanban board, sprint planner, milestone tracker, calendar view, and real-time group chat directly into any Astro project — no external database or third-party SaaS required.
highlights: Built a drag-and-drop Kanban board, sprint planner, milestone tracker, and calendar view backed entirely by GitHub Issues
Added real-time group chat with no external database or third-party SaaS dependency

projects.name: ft_transcendence
projects.description: Full-stack multiplayer web application built as a team project at 42 Abu Dhabi, with a TypeScript frontend, Nest.js backend, and PostgreSQL database.
highlights: Worked in a 4-person Agile team using feature-branch workflow and code review
Led frontend implementation with the Nuxt.js framework, translating Figma designs into code

volunteer.summary: Mentor peers on build systems (Makefiles) and memory-management practices.

certificates.name: AgentEra AI Hackathon — Certificate of Appreciation
